stylePrompt: Create a completely original minimalist lighting product defined by visual silence, exact proportion, concealed engineering, and maximum functional clarity. Treat the lamp as part of a no-main-light architectural system: slim, glare-controlled, modular, and visually integrated. Every line and component must have a purpose. The final design should make the space feel cleaner and taller while delivering layered illumination without decorative noise.
specificElements: A light source hidden inside a narrow slot
A glare-control baffle integrated into the body
